title: Crafting a User Persona for an E-commerce Website
scenario: Develop a user persona for a 30-year-old online shopper named Emily. Emily is a busy professional who values convenience, affordability, and reliability when shopping online. Describe Emily's demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors in a concise and detailed way. Use a format that includes sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors. Keep the description under 200 words.
constraints: Must use a format with sections for demographics, needs, pain points, and behaviors

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the user persona adhere to the format and word limit requirements?
Is the user persona clear and easy to understand?
Does the user persona include all necessary information about the target user?
